title: Sentry server via unpinned npx with token and API-key envs is REVIEW

origin.description: Public documentation config from getsentry/sentry-mcp (README.md (stdio / npx)). Content verbatim; only normalized to a valid JSON root. Upstream placeholders preserved.

humanExpectation.rationale: Two credential-shaped envs (a Sentry access token and an OpenAI API key) plus an unpinned npx package are all review-worthy, but none is independently blocking.
knownLimitations: EMBEDDED_AGENT_PROVIDER is not credential-shaped and is correctly not flagged; the two key/token names are.
